title: Skill Verifier Rubric Schema
description: OpenAI-compatible rubric schema for LLM-as-judge style checks. Every skill eval must produce output matching this schema.

overall_pass.description: Whether the skill output passes overall quality standards.

score.description: Aggregate quality score for the skill output.

notes.description: Human-readable explanation of the check result, including specifics on what passed or failed.

checks.description: Array of per-check results. Must include at least one check.
